metaobjectDefinitions.name: Art movement
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Defines the stylistic approach or art movement of a painting, e.g. Impressionism, Expressionism

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Art style
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Describes the aesthetic style of a product, such as art nouveau or typography

fieldDefinitions.name: Base art style
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Artwork authenticity
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Indicates the authenticity of the artwork, specifying whether it is an original creation or a reproduction

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Artwork frame material
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Identifies the material used in art frames, such as wood or gold-plated

fieldDefinitions.name: Base artwork frame material
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Color
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

fieldDefinitions.name: Base color
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

fieldDefinitions.name: Base pattern
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Decoration material
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Identifies the material used for decoration, such as sequins or feathers

fieldDefinitions.name: Base decoration material
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Frame style
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Describes the design or type of frame for artwork, such as modern or rustic

fieldDefinitions.name: Base frame style
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Material
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

fieldDefinitions.name: Base material
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Orientation
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Specifies the product's intended positioning, e.g. horizontal, vertical

fieldDefinitions.name: Base orientation
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Painting medium
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Indicates the primary material or technique used in a painting, e.g. acrylic, oil

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Photographic paper type
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Specifies the type of photographic paper used, such as satin or metallic

fieldDefinitions.name: Base photographic paper type
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Rarity
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Specifies the uniqueness of items, typically for collectibles; e.g. limited edition, ultra rare

fieldDefinitions.name: Base rarity
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Signature presence
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Specifies whether and how the painting is signed by the artist.

metaobjectDefinitions.name: Theme
metaobjectDefinitions.description: Describes the product's primary theme or motif, such as sport, space, or holidays

fieldDefinitions.name: Base theme
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization
